nodes.label:
2026-05-22 - Missing HTTP Security Headers
**Vulnerability:** Application missing standard HTTP security headers (X-Frame-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options, etc).
**Learning:** Next.js application needs explicit configuration for security headers using the `async headers()` function in `next.config.js`.
**Prevention:** Added security headers to `next.config.js` targeting all paths (`/(.*)`) to ensure full coverage across the application.
nodes.norm_label:
2026-05-22 - missing http security headers
**vulnerability:** application missing standard http security headers (x-frame-options, strict-transport-security, x-content-type-options, etc).
**learning:** next.js application needs explicit configuration for security headers using the `async headers()` function in `next.config.js`.
**prevention:** added security headers to `next.config.js` targeting all paths (`/(.*)`) to ensure full coverage across the application.
